data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data at rest and in transit to protect sensitive information from unauthorized access.

data.title: Security Incident and Event Management (SIEM)
data.description: Monitors and analyzes security-related events in real-time to identify potential threats.

data.title: Network Security
data.description: Implements network security measures like firewalls and intrusion detection systems to safeguard data.
data.technical_spec: AWS WAF, VPC Shield, Firewall Manager

data.title: Identity and Access Management (IAM)
data.description: Manages access rights and user authentication to ensure that only authorized users can access resources.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic security audits and penetration testing to identify and fix vulnerabilities.
